mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees WHERE MONTH(hire_date) = MONTH(CURRENT_DATE) AND YEAR(hire_date) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)
SELECT d.name AS department_name, COUNT(e.id) AS count FROM departments d LEFT JOIN employees e ON d.id = e.department_id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT e.name, e.position, e.hire_date AS hireDate, d.name AS departmentName FROM employees e LEFT JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id ORDER BY e.hire_date DESC LIMIT 5
